title: Dashboard Layout Component
content:
This component defines the overall layout for the dashboard section of the application.

It uses a flexbox arrangement to create a two-column layout: a fixed sidebar on the left and the main content area that takes up the remaining space on the right.

**Purpose:**
To provide a consistent structural foundation for all pages within the `/dashboard` route.

**Key Components/Features:**
- **`Sidebar`**: Imported from `@/components/ui/sidebar`, this component renders the navigation sidebar.
- **Main Content Area**: The `children` prop is rendered within a `<main>` tag that allows for vertical scrolling (`overflow-y-auto`).
- **Styling**: Utilizes Tailwind CSS classes for layout (`flex`, `h-screen`, `bg-background`, `overflow-hidden`) and responsiveness.

**Usage:**
This layout component is used in `app/dashboard/layout.tsx` to wrap all dashboard pages. Any component rendered as a child of this layout will appear in the main content area to the right of the sidebar.
